title: CS Services in Mizoram | Virtual Auditor

bodyText:
What is company secretary services? Company secretarial services — annual ROC filings, board resolutions, share transfers, director appointments, compliance calendar.
Company Secretary Services is a professional service offered by Virtual Auditor, an AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333) led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV), serving clients in Mizoram, Mizoram since 2012.
Quick Answer: CS Services in Mizoram — Company secretarial services — annual ROC filings, board resolutions, share transfers, director appo. From ₹5,000. Contact +91 99622 60333.

HEADING2: Company Secretary Services in Mizoram
Virtual Auditor provides company secretary services across Mizoram. With offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, we serve businesses throughout Mizoram with the same quality of FCA + ACS + CFE + IBBI RV-led professional services.
The ROC Shillong handles company registrations and filings for Mizoram. Stamp duty: As per state schedule. Professional tax: Not applicable.

HEADING2: Our Service Scope
• Annual ROC Filing (AOC-4, MGT-7)
• Board Resolution Drafting
• Director Appointment/Resignation (DIR-12)
• Share Transfer & Transmission
• Increase in Authorised Capital
• Registered Office Change
• Name Change (INC-24)
• Winding Up & Strike-Off

HEADING2: Why Virtual Auditor for Mizoram
Our founder CA V. Viswanathan holds four credentials — FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV — which means your cs services is handled by the same qualified professional, not a rotating cast of junior associates.
Technology that accelerates: Automated compliance calendars, AI-assisted document analysis, and 10,000 Monte Carlo simulations for valuations.

HEADING2: Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.q: What is included in annual ROC filing?
faqs.a: AOC-4 (financial statements), MGT-7 (annual return), ADT-1 (auditor appointment). Due within 30-60 days of AGM.
Yes. DIR-12 for appointment/resignation, DIR-3 KYC annual update, DIN deactivation if needed.

faqs.q: What happens if ROC filings are delayed?
faqs.a: Additional fees of ₹100/day per form. Prolonged default can lead to company strike-off and director disqualification.

faqs.q: Do you provide cs services services in Mizoram?
faqs.a: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Mizoram from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

faqs.q: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Mizoram?
faqs.a: Companies registered in Mizoram fall under ROC Shillong. Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Mizoram-registered companies.

faqs.q: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Mizoram?
faqs.a: Stamp duty in Mizoram: As per state schedule. Professional tax: Not applicable. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
